site.title: International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Kubva pakudiwa kwekuwanika kusvika kuzvitoro zvevoruzhinji
nav.label: Chokutanga
meta.home.description: IATF inoshandura zvinodikanwa chaizvoizvo zvokuwanika kuva nzvimbo dzinochengeterwa mashoko epachena.
meta.projects.description: Bhurawuza mapurojekiti ekuwanikwa neruzhinji akaburitswa kuburikidza neIATF.
meta.propose.description: Kumbira chirongwa chekuwanika kubva kuIATF kuburikidza newebhu, email, kana Discord.
meta.governance.description: Verenga kuti IATF inogamuchira sei mapurojekiti, inotarisira nzvimbo dzokuchengetera zvinhu, uye inoita kuti basa rive pachena.
meta.join.description: Nzira dzokutora chikamu muIATF: kupa kodhi, kushandura, kuyedza, kana kuchengetedza chirongwa.
meta.accessibility.description: IATF inotarisira sei kuchengetedza iyi webhusaiti inowanikwa uye maitiro ekuzivisa chipingamupinyi chekuwanika.
meta.transparency.description: Zvinyorwa zvepachena zveIATF: zvisarudzo, mapurojekiti, uye zvigadziriso zvinochengetwa zvakavhurika nekutadza.
registry.empty.title: Hapana mapurojekiti akabudiswa
registry.empty.body: IATF iri kugadzirira purogiramu yayo yokutanga yevoruzhinji.
proposal.form.title: Tumira chikumbiro
proposal.form.body: Zadza fomu riri pasi apa kuti utumire chikumbiro kuIATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript inodikanwa kushandisa iyi fomu yewebhu. Kana isipo, shandisa email kana Discord pachinzvimbo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live submission haina kugadzirirwa mumamiriro ezvinhu aya. Fomu iri richavhura email yako pachinzvimbo.
proposal.form.ready: Kuendesa kwakachengeteka kwakagadzirira. Paunotumira chikumbiro, IATF ichagadzira chinyorwa chekutora.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Ndapota pedzisa spam kudzivirira kuongorora usati watumira.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Dziviriro ye spam yapera. Ndapota pedzisa cheki zvakare usati watumira.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kudzivirirwa kweSpam hakugoni kuongororwa panguva ino. Ndapota edza zvakare.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Nguva yekudzivirira spam yapera. Ndapota edza kuongorora zvakare.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Ndapota zadza minda inodiwa usati watumira.
proposal.form.success: Chikumbiro chenyu chakagamuchirwa ndokuchengetwa kuti chiongororwe.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Kana iwe ukabata IATF zvakare nezve ichi chikumbiro, sanganisira chinongedzo pazasi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Chimwe chinhu chakakanganisika pakutumira chikumbiro. Ndapota edza zvakare. Kana dambudziko richipfuurira, shandisa email panzvimbo.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Manyuko echiNgezi chaiwo, shanduro dzinogona kuwedzerwa gare gare
footer.label: Peji rezasi resaiti
footer.blurb: Basa rokuwanika rinofanira kuva nyore kutanga, nyore kubudisa, uye nyore kuchengeta rakazaruka.
footer.source: Rondedzero yemitemo yekuwanika: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Unyanzvi hunotaurwa nevashandisi vezvigadzirwa zvinobatsira.
contact.label: Kukurukurirana
translation.label: Shanduro yemamiriro ezvinhu
translation.source: Mutauro weChirungu ndiwo mutauro unoshandiswa pakunyora peji ino.
translation.humanReviewed: Shanduro iyi yakadzokororwa nemutauri anotaura zvakanaka.
translation.machineAssisted: Shanduro iyi yakaitwa nemuchina uye haisati yaongororwa zvizere nemutauri anotaura zvakanaka. Mazano anogamuchirwa kuburikidza neGitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Shanduro iyi yakaongororwa isati yagadziridzwa mumutauro weChirungu uye ingada kugadziridzwa.
